name: White Meat Ravioli
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Parmesan or Romano cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except pasta, in a large mixing bowl and combine thoroughly.
2. Fill ravioli with mixture.
3. Heat oil over medium heat. Stir-fry scallions and garlic for about 30 seconds.
4. Add tomatoes, tomato sauce, and basil. Stir.
5. Simmer for 10-15 minutes.
